  "result": "<Meal>
  <name>Tofu Veggie Curry — Citrus Fresh Combo</name>
  <short_description>Tofu and mixed vegetables in curry sauce over rice, a quick, plant-based curry meal with citrusy freshness.</short_description>
  <meal_suggestion>For more fiber, swap white rice for brown rice or quinoa. Opt for a low-sodium curry sauce and add a side of leafy greens for extra volume and micronutrients. A squeeze of lemon or lime can enhance the citrus freshness mentioned in the name.</meal_suggestion>
  <ingredients>
    <item name="tofu" />
    <item name="mixed vegetables" />
    <item name="curry sauce" />
    <item name="rice" />
  </ingredients>
  <nutrition_note>Plant-based protein from tofu, fiber from mixed vegetables, and carbohydrates from rice. The curry sauce adds flavor and sodium; consider portion control or choosing a low-sodium option if needed.</nutrition_note>
</Meal>"
